character_dossiers.name: the blind man
character_dossiers.biography: A blind beggar who interacts with the narrator and the captain, described as a 'horrible, soft-spoken, eyeless creature'.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A sick old buccaneer who sits with a drawn cutlass and dies from apoplexy.

character_dossiers.name: Doctor Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A doctor mentioned in the captain's order to be called.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: The narrator's mother, who is left unprotected after the captain's death.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A shipmate mentioned as one of the captain's men.

character_dossiers.name: the blind beggar
character_dossiers.biography: A blind beggar who interacts with the narrator and the captain, described as a 'horrible, soft-spoken, eyeless creature'.
